title: Piano Movers in Addis Ababa: Expert Handling Guide
excerpt: Piano moving: uprights and grands, equipment, stairs, climate, truck placement, tuning after, vetting questions, when to use specialists.
content:
Piano movers in Addis Ababa: expert handling guide

Pianos combine heavy mass, fragile action, sensitive tuning, and awkward geometry. Uprights and grands each demand specific equipment and crew skills. This guide explains what expert handling looks like and when to insist on specialists.

Why pianos are not general furniture

Internal cast-iron plates, hundreds of pounds of tension on strings, and delicate legs or pedals mean improvisation breaks instruments and injures people. Weight is often underestimated from the outside.

Upright pianos

Heavy duty straps, piano dollies or skid boards, minimum crew count for stairs, and clear communication on pivot points. Padding protects casework; never roll on casters down stairs.

Grand pianos

Leg and pedal lyre removal when required; the body may travel on its side on a padded skid with the lid secured and wrapped. Lid and music desk hardware bagged and labeled.

Stairs and landings

Measure clear width and tread depth before move day. If a turn is impossible, discuss hoisting or crane options with qualified vendors—not forced angles.

Climate and cover

Avoid long exposure to rain or extreme heat. Use breathable padding where possible; sealed plastic against sun can trap moisture.

Truck placement

Pianos ride against stable walls with straps that do not crush molding; never last-loaded loose where other items can shift into them.

After the move: tuning

Expect tuning after relocation once the instrument acclimates—often days, not hours. Budget time and a qualified technician.

Questions to ask a mover

  • How many pianos did you move last month?
  • What equipment do you bring specifically for pianos?
  • Who carries liability if damage occurs to action or case?

When to refuse a generic crew

If they have no piano dolly, no stair plan, and no references for instruments, escalate to a dedicated piano team even if it costs more.

Insurance and declared value

Discuss caps before move day; photograph case condition pre-wrap.

Building access

Freight elevator dimensions and padded cab rules—submit crew IDs early like any high-value condo move.

Conclusion

Expert piano handling in Addis is equipment plus choreography plus humility about stairs. Pay for competence—the alternative is repair bills that dwarf a careful quote.
author: Active Movers Team
